description: For the woman with an modern, dynamic lifestyle, the Floral Dream from adidas is the right choice. Bottled in a light green flacon it has top notes of bergamot middle notes of lily and rose base notes of tonka bean and vanilla.Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
